_publications._publicationTitle: Unbalancing cAMP and Ras/MAPK pathways as a therapeutic strategy for cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: While cells treated with single agents alone did not stain for MPZ protein, cotreated cells were highly MPZ positive, indicating a promyelinization-differentiating SC phenotype
details: Successfully detected myelin protein zero to assess SC differentiation and myelinization. Cotreated cells were highly MPZ positive indicating promyelinization-differentiating SC phenotype, while single agent treatments showed no MPZ staining
